card_name_verified: Capital One Venture Business (formerly Spark Miles for Business, $95 AF)
card_status_alert: REBRANDED 2026-04-14: Spark Miles → Venture Business. Two NEW recurring credits added per Capital One press release + Frequent Miler reporting. Existing $100 Global Entry credit retained (every-4-years cadence). Catalog should rename card_id to 'capital-one-venture-biz' (or similar).

recurring_credits.name: Capital One Business Travel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $50 annual statement credit on eligible bookings made through Capital One Business Travel portal. Added 2026-04-14 with Venture Business rebrand.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: $50 annual Capital One Business Travel credit for cardholders, applicable to eligible bookings made through Capital One Business Travel

recurring_credits.name: Advertising or Software Statement Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $50 annual statement credit on eligible advertising or software purchases. Added 2026-04-14 with Venture Business rebrand.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: up to $50 annual advertising or software credit, offering statement credits on eligible purchases across key categories that small businesses rely on

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry or TSA PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee, every 4 years.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: Existing Global Entry/TSA PreCheck credit retained from Spark Miles era
